case_title: RICHARD YEE VS. DOMINIQUE ALEXANDER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE DOES I TO X THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1134 HYDE STREET, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD SERVED DEC-03-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE DOES I TO X
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, RICHARD SERVED DEC-03-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I TO X
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE DOES I TO X
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, DOMINIQUE
